task_completion.description: Navigate to PVWatts and enter the target location
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing pvwatts.nrel.gov with '85001' or 'Phoenix' entered in the location search field, or the map step confirming Phoenix, AZ.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified solar system parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing the 'System Info' step of PVWatts with the following values visible: 8 (DC System Size), Premium (Module Type), Fixed Roof Mount (Array Type), 14 (System Losses), 18 (Tilt), and 180 (Azimuth).
Browser showing the PVWatts 'Results' page with an annual AC energy output value visible (should be approximately 13,961 kWh).

task_completion.description: Bookmark the results page in a 'Client Estimates' folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser bookmark menu, star dialog, or bookmark manager visible, showing the PVWatts Results page being saved inside a folder explicitly named 'Client Estimates'.
Browser download indicator/popup showing a downloaded CSV file from PVWatts, or a file manager window showing the CSV file in the Downloads folder.

task_completion.description: Create the solar production report text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing a file named 'solar_production_report.txt' (saved in ~/Documents) containing the Yearly AC Energy Output value obtained from the PVWatts results.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the PVWatts calculator
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a graphical web browser navigating the PVWatts website, not terminal commands (like curl) or python scripts fetching the API.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just guess or hardcode the expected output
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must actually reach the PVWatts results page before creating the report file. The value in the text file must match the value shown on the browser results page.

integrity.description: Verify the report file was actually created in the correct location
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or file manager should clearly indicate the file path is ~/Documents/solar_production_report.txt, rather than just a terminal echo command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target URL is https://pvwatts.nrel.gov/. The location is Phoenix, AZ (ZIP 85001). The exact parameters are: 8 kW DC system, Fixed Roof Mount (array_type=1), Premium modules (module_type=1), 14% system losses, 18-degree tilt, and 180-degree azimuth. With these parameters, the expected annual AC energy output is approximately 13,961 kWh (acceptable range: 13,000 - 16,000 kWh). The bookmark folder must be exactly named 'Client Estimates'. The report must be saved at ~/Documents/solar_production_report.txt.
